About me

Hi, I'm Nicholas.

I am a product-oriented cybersecurity AI engineer. I define product direction, align technical and senior stakeholders, and work hands-on with multi-agent workflows, data, and cloud systems to move ideas from ambiguous problems to useful products.

Selected work Product decisions, technical systems, and measurable outcomes. Skills Product strategy, agentic AI, engineering, and cybersecurity. Personal Life outside work, from home projects and milestones to travel.
